column1: # OTA-capable layout for the 4 MB ESP32-S3 (N4R2).
#                                  so existing calibrations survive the reflash.
#   0x0F000  otadata     (8 KB)   — tracks which OTA slot to boot.
#   0x20000  ota_0       (1.5 MB) — first firmware slot; a fresh flash lands here.
#   0x1A0000 ota_1       (1.5 MB) — second slot; OTA uploads alternate.
#   0x320000 storage     (256 KB) — reserved for future user data.
# App partitions must be aligned to 0x10000 (64 KB)
# small gap between phy_init and ota_0.
